summary: Iteration 3: Tested new cron scheduler feature and verified DonantesPage JSX fix. All backend cron endpoints working correctly. All frontend pages load without errors. Cron scheduler card visible in Configuracion page with correct status and manual run button.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, chart renders correctly

passed_tests: POST /api/cron/notificaciones-diarias returns proper response (email not configured case)
Configuracion page shows 'Recordatorios Automáticos' card with 'Activo' status badge
Configuracion page has 'Ejecutar Cron Manualmente' button that works correctly
Cron manual execution shows toast: 'Cron ejecutado. 0 notificaciones en cola.'
Donantes page loads correctly after JSX fix (table, filters, export CSV button, Nuevo Donante button)
Alertas AML page loads with tabs (Alertas/Reglas) and stats
Workflows page loads with workflow list
Dashboard loads with stats and charts
All sidebar navigation links work (Dashboard, Donantes, Donativos, CFDIs, Calendario Fiscal, Transparencia, Alertas AML, Reportes, Workflows, Configuración)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load correctly, cron UI working)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from iteration_2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 focused on new cron scheduler feature. Backend endpoints /api/cron/status and /api/cron/notificaciones-diarias work correctly. Frontend Configuracion page shows 'Recordatorios Automáticos' card at bottom (scroll needed) with scheduler status, schedule info, and manual run button. Email notifications are MOCKED (RESEND_API_KEY not configured). DonantesPage JSX fix verified - page loads correctly with all elements.

mocked_apis.CFDI_PAC_Integration: CFDI timbrado (stamping) is MOCKED - returns simulated UUID
mocked_apis.Email_Notifications: Email notifications MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY not configured, cron returns 0 notifications
